title: Find and fix the one buggy module among many
task: `npm test` fails in test/clamp.test.js: a utility is not capping values at its upper bound. The src/ directory holds about fifteen small utility modules re-exported through src/index.js; only one of them is wrong, and there is a similarly named decoy (src/clampList.js) that is fine. Locate the actual buggy module, fix it at its source, and leave the other modules untouched. Do not modify the tests. Run the tests to verify.

checks.pattern: caps values above the upper bound

notes: Tests how well the agent navigates a larger fixture to the right file. The fix lives in src/clamp.js (wrong comparison on the upper bound); the decoy src/clampList.js must not be the one touched. file_not_contains removes the buggy comparison.
